positive: Minimalist geometric woodland animal arrangement, featuring a majestic stylized fox, a playful bunny, and a graceful owl nestled amongst abstract stylized pine branches and crescent moons. The design utilizes a limited, highly contrasting color palette of muted sage green, terracotta orange, deep navy blue, and creamy off-white. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, forming a clean silhouette graphic suitable for t-shirt printing. The style should be modern bohemian, linework illustration with solid block colors and subtle negative space, reminiscent of mid-century Scandinavian design meets contemporary Nordic illustration. The overall mood is whimsical, calm, and sophisticated. Vector art quality, crisp lines, perfect symmetry, high contrast graphic design.
negative: blur, artifacts, low quality, text, watermark, logo, writing, noise, messy, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, photorealistic, 3d render
